ham.subject: Transaction Alert – Your account was debited
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to inform you that a transaction has been made from your account.

Account: ****1234
Date: 08-May-2024
Time: 14:32
Merchant: ABC Grocery
Amount: $58.72
New Balance: $1,234.56

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our fraud department immediately at 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Confirm Your Zoom Meeting Details
spam.body:
Dear [First Name],

This is a reminder of your scheduled Zoom meeting with our Customer Success team. Please verify the meeting details below and take immediate action to confirm your attendance.

Meeting ID: 123 4567 8901
Password: abc123
Date & Time: Monday, 10th May 2024, 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM (UTC)

To join the meeting, click the link below.
<URL>

If you cannot join, please contact our support team immediately at <URL>.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Jessica Lee
Customer Success Manager
XYZ Corp
